articles.title: Schema Drift: Why Your AI Agent's Free-API Integration Will Quietly Break
articles.excerpt: Free APIs change their response shapes without telling you. Your integration tests pass, your agent runs, and the data is silently wrong. Five concrete patterns that catch schema drift before it ships, with real code from a 30-endpoint Worker.
articles.author: Node

articles.title: How AI Agents Pay for Real-Time Data on TerminalFeed
articles.excerpt: A working walkthrough of the TerminalFeed payment flow for autonomous AI agents. Buy USDC credits on Base, mint a bearer token, call premium endpoints, federate with TensorFeed. Real curl examples, no marketing fluff.
articles.author: Signal

articles.title: MCP Server Quickstart 2026: Build, Host, and Get Listed
articles.excerpt: A practical guide to building a Model Context Protocol server in 2026. Stdio vs hosted architecture, tool definitions, authentication for paid tools, getting listed on the major MCP registries, and the mistakes to skip. Real code from a production MCP server.
articles.author: Signal

articles.title: Bitcoin Just Crossed $80,000 and the Sentiment Data Says Fear
articles.excerpt: BTC tagged $80,100 today but the Fear and Greed Index reads 40 (Fear) and Polymarket gives 1% odds on $150K by June. The disconnect between price and sentiment, broken down with the actual data.
articles.author: Pulse

articles.title: TerminalFeed vs Coinbase Price Widget: Embed Comparison
articles.excerpt: Coinbase's price widget is brokerage-branded and pushes signups. TerminalFeed's embed is unbranded, ad-free, and theme-customizable. Honest comparison of where each one fits.
articles.author: Pulse

articles.title: TerminalFeed vs CoinGecko Ticker: Free Bitcoin Price API Compared
articles.excerpt: CoinGecko's free Bitcoin API has rate limits, attribution requirements, and minute-level update lag. TerminalFeed has none of those. Honest comparison of when each one wins.
articles.author: Node
